narrative:
Franklin County has 885,292 registered voters, with 61.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.7 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 33.0% of registrants.
